description: Locked launch ladder. One base platform subscription (Your Deputy Core), atomic modules, outcome packs (bundle-pricing.json), 3 suites, 4 editions, plus commercial essentials. Use the pricing formulas below when adding any new pack, suite, or edition.

tiers.name: Your Deputy Core
tiers.description: The business workspace. CRM, contact records, templates, dashboard, automation marketplace access. No modules included — customers activate what they need à la carte or via packs/suites/editions.

editions.name: Solo Service Edition
editions.positioning: Everything a one-person shop needs to catch more leads and grow reviews.

editions.name: Small Team Edition
editions.positioning: Lead response + scheduling + retention for teams with a real front office.

editions.name: Field Service Edition
editions.for: HVAC, plumbing, electrical, pest control, cleaning, landscaping
editions.positioning: The vertical stack — built for field-service operators with recurring maintenance.

editions.name: Enterprise / Multi-Location
editions.for: Multi-location operators, franchises, and >$10M service businesses
editions.positioning: Custom scope. Volume pricing. Dedicated onboarding.

suites.name: Growth Suite
suites.positioning: Catch more leads and turn happy customers into public reviews.

suites.name: Service Operations Suite
suites.positioning: Keep the calendar full. Win back customers before they drift.

suites.name: Revenue Suite
suites.notes: Currently includes Billing Pack only. Expands with a Sales Pack once estimate/proposal modules are live beyond estimate_followup. Priced at pack-parity for now; raises when second pack lands.
suites.positioning: Get paid faster. Cut DSO without awkward phone calls.

pack_formula.description: Mechanical pack pricing. Always cheaper than buying constituent modules individually.

commercial_essentials.annual_discount_description: Two months free on annual prepay across all tiers, packs, suites, and editions.

multi_location.description: Each additional location adds a workspace partition with its own business hours, staff, and automations.

hipaa_addon.description: BAA-covered processing, audit-log retention, consent capture, claim-policy guardrails. Required for med spa (injectables), home health, and any tenant with PHI.

starter.description: Async-only concierge kit: template pack, video walkthrough, AI-assisted chat support. No human setup call. Human time requires upgrade to Guided.

guided.description: 1 human setup call, integrations wired, up to 5 modules activated, light migration.

premium.description: Multi-location setup, advanced workflows, full customization and data migration.

launcher_build_handoff.description: Locked per docs/strategy/COMMERCIAL_DECISIONS.md Decision 2. Bundled-months model: Professional and Enterprise builds include a subscription runway paid out of the one-time build price. Subscription begins at regular monthly rate after the included period.
